case_title: ARTEMIO LOPEZ RODRIGUEZ VS. PAK SHING WAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ARTEMIO LOPEZ AS TO DEFENDANT WAN, PAK SHING AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SUCCESS CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ARTEMIO LOPEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAN, PAK SHING AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SUCCESS CONSTRUCTION $6,514.27 PRINCIPAL, $27.28 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,766.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
